params._nftContract: Address of the RepoBoxNames NFT contract
params._recipient: Address that receives the ETH payments

currentPrice().details: Calculate the current price for minting

returns._0: uint256 The current price in wei

emergencyWithdraw().details: Emergency function to recover stuck ETH (should not normally happen) Only callable by the NFT contract owner

params.name: The subdomain name (without .repo.box)
params.resolvedAddress: The EVM address this name should resolve to

nextPrice().details: Get the price for the next mint

returns._0: uint256 The price for the next token
bool True if valid, false otherwise
